final_prompt.prompt:
Create a game concept art piece depicting a medieval fantasy dragon lair scene inside an active volcano's lava cavern.

Style/medium: photorealistic digital concept art in the tradition of Dungeons & Dragons classic fantasy aesthetic, painterly rendering with high-fidelity surface detail, reminiscent of senior game concept artists at studios like Blizzard or CD Projekt Red
Composition: wide-angle establishing shot from a low vantage point looking up toward the dragon, emphasizing the creature's overwhelming scale; wings spread to fill the upper cavern space; treasure mound occupies the foreground mid-ground
Subject: an ancient dragon of immense size coiled atop a towering mound of gold coins and treasures; scales interwoven deep crimson and black with complex iridescent patterning; wings fully extended, spanning most of the cavern width; eyes radiating intense molten-gold light
Scene/backdrop: deep interior of a lava cavern inside an active volcano; cavern walls streaked with flowing lava channels; far background reveals a cavern entrance through which a single shaft of cool moonlight penetrates; treasure mound strewn with bizarre magical artifacts, ancient suits of armor, and glowing gemstones of various colors
Lighting/mood: dominant warm light from lava flows — deep orange-red casting complex specular highlights and shadow patterns across every scale facet; secondary cool blue-white moonlight from the distant entrance creating a stark warm-cool contrast; eyes emit a self-illuminated golden glow as a third light source; overall mood is epic, foreboding, and awe-inspiring
Color palette: deep crimson and black as primary tones anchored in the dragon's body, orange-gold as the dominant ambient light from lava, cool silver-blue moonlight as a contrasting accent at the far entrance, glowing gem colors (emerald, sapphire, violet) as scattered accent points within the treasure pile
Materials/textures: individual scale plates with visible micro-surface detail — overlapping keratin edges, subsurface scatter on thinner membrane areas of the wings; gold coins with worn minting detail; ancient armor with dented and oxidized metal surfaces; raw volcanic rock with glassy obsidian veins and matte ash deposits
Avoid: cartoon or stylized proportions, flat shading, generic fantasy clip-art dragon poses, symmetrical tunnel lighting, over-saturated neon colors, watermark, stuffer quality words
